---
title: "Schedule"
page-layout: full
---

SR = *Statistical Rethinking* by Richard McElreath

SR(K)[^1] = Solomon Kurz's [translation of McElreath's book](https://solomon.quarto.pub/sr/).

[^1]: McElreath's R code is primarily in base R, and much of the Bayesian sampling utilizes a neat but idiosyncratic package of his own design. Kurz's workbook provides code for all of McElreath's exercises using tidyverse & [brms](https://github.com/paul-buerkner/brms) syntax.

BR = *Bayes Rules* by Johnson, Ott, and Dogucu

+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Week    | Meeting Day | Topic                                                    | Reading(s) and Lecture content                                                                                                      |
+=========+=============+==========================================================+=====================================================================================================================================+
| 1       | June 19th   | Introduction to Bayesian thinking                        | - Chapter 1 of SR                                                                                                                   |
|         |             |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
|         |             |                                                          | - [Introduction to Bayesian Workflow](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ztbYkBPDOgU&list=PLDcUM9US4XdNOlqSyhe38US8mFgmqzI14) lecture  |
|         |             |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
|         |             |                                                          | - [Frequentist statistics, the Null Ritual, and *p*-values](https://stefanocoretta.github.io/qdal/ch-null-ritual.html)              |
+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 2       | TBA         | Bayesian probabilities and 'sampling from the imaginary' | - Chapters 2 & 3 in SR                                                                                                              |
|         |             |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
|         |             |                                                          | - Chapters 2 & 3 in SR(K)                                                                                                           |
|         |             |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
|         |             |                                                          | - [The Garden of Forking Data lecture](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pGVkCWlXnlg&list=PLDcUM9US4XdNOlqSyhe38US8mFgmqzI14&index=2) |
+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 3       | TBA         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 4       | TBA         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 5       | TBA         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 6       | TBA         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                     |
+---------+-------------+----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
